en: Restores 8% of max HP to a target ally
Increases movement speed of all allies by 20% for 4 seconds
Reduces incoming damage by 20% for 5 seconds

ko: 현재 모든 스킬의 남은 재사용 대기시간 20% 감소\n현재 HP 10% 소모
en: Reduces remaining cooldown of all current skills by 20%\nConsumes 10% of current HP
Reduces movement speed of enemies within 7m by 60% for 6 seconds
Grants all allies 12% lifesteal for 8 seconds

ko: 지정 위치로 향로 투사체 발사\n6초간 주변 적을 해당 위치로 유인
en: Fires an incense projectile to the target position\nLures nearby enemies to that position for 6 seconds
Increases attack of all allies by 40 for 8 seconds
Restores 5% of max HP per second for 6 seconds
Summons 8 lightning strikes\nEach strike deals 120 damage
Reduces movement speed of enemies within 10m by 80% for 6 seconds

ko: 지정 위치로 주변 적 강제 끌어당김\n끌려온 적 2초 속박
en: Forcefully pulls nearby enemies to the target position\nRoots pulled enemies for 2 seconds
Summons a massive lightning strike at the target position\nDeals 750 damage within 10m
Night Parade of a Thousand Ghosts
Summons vengeful spirits that automatically chase enemies for 10 seconds\nDeals 220 damage per second

ko:
전장 전체에 낙뢰 폭격
총 20회 낙뢰
낙뢰당 240 피해
시전 후 5초간 게이지 충전 불가
en:
Bombards the entire battlefield with lightning
A total of 20 lightning strikes
Each strike deals 240 damage
Gauge cannot be charged for 5 seconds after casting

ko: 공격 시 12% 확률로 냉기 상태 부여\n이동속도 15% 감소\n2초 지속
en: 12% chance to inflict Chill on hit\nMovement Speed -15%\nDuration: 2 seconds

ko: 공격 시 15% 확률로 중독 상태 부여\n초당 공격력의 8% 피해\n3초 지속
en: 15% chance to inflict Poison on hit\nDeals damage equal to 8% of Attack Power per second\nDuration: 3 seconds

ko: 공격 시 10% 확률로 화상 상태 부여\n공격력 15% 감소\n3초 지속
en: 10% chance to inflict Burn on hit\nAttack Power -15%\nDuration: 3 seconds

ko: 공격 시 8% 확률로 감전 상태 부여\n0.5초 동안 행동 불가
en: 8% chance to inflict Shock on hit\nStuns the target for 0.5 seconds
Knocks enemies back on hit\nKnockback Distance: 0.4m

ko: 적 처치 시 6% 확률로 추가 골드 드랍\n기본 골드의 100%
en: 6% chance to drop bonus gold on kill\nBonus Gold: 100% of base gold
Reflects 15% of received damage back to the attacker
Gain +0.2% Attack Power for every 1% HP lost
